title: SUGC: Sparse Unbiased Galaxy Clustering
description: Correlation function counters for galaxy catalogues drawn from sparse sub-volumes of periodic N-body simulations. Computes xi(r), xi(s, mu) multipoles, and high-order N-point functions with corrections for statistical under-sampling in m-of-k sub-volume realisations.

creators.name: Hickman, Oscar
creators.affiliation: Institute for Computational Cosmology, Durham University
